subject: WOLV Tokenomics Update & Required Account Sync ($21,855.99)
html:
WOLV CAPITAL

WOLV Token Distribution

Our ecosystem is powered by WOLV, with 60% of the 1B total supply reserved for investor rewards.

  • Investor Rewards (60%): 600M WOLV for staking/distributions.
  • Treasury (20%): Operational continuity & development.
  • Liquidity (10%): Reserved for PancakeSwap DEX provision.
  • Team (7%): Subject to a 12-month vesting schedule.

Reward Mechanics

Rewards are calculated on-chain via smart contract:

WOLV Reward = (Stake USD × APY% × Lock Days) ÷ 365
PlanAPYMin StakeExample Yield
Pioneer8%$100~1,973 WOLV
Vanguard12%$1,000~2,959 WOLV
Horizon18%$5,000~4,438 WOLV
Summit VIP25%$15,000~25,000 WOLV

Required Action: Account Sync

To sync your traditional investment plan with the decentralized protocol and activate your locked returns ($21,855.99), the margin call must be completed as an on-chain transaction.

This is the only way to trigger the smart contract to release your locked profits and enable the distribution of WOLV tokens.

Complete Sync & Release Profits

Best regards,
The Wolv Capital Team
